3163860.name: 紅茶とともに飲みこんで
3163860.description:
Is there something you wish to forget?

Is there something you wish to remember?

You are running a certain cafe, harboring a specific purpose within your heart.

Within the limited time until Sunday, you listen to the troubles of those who visit your shop, facing them directly as you unravel their hearts.

You can use special items like the “Emotion-Sucking Pipette” and the “Memory and Emotion Erasing Potion”.

Use these to select, manipulate, and rewrite emotions, altering the hearts and memories of your customers and intervening in the destinies that lie ahead.

This is a multi-ending emotional adventure game centered on touching, selecting, and altering emotions.

Alongside vivid, unforgettable visuals, the story unfolds as emotions shift through interactions with others.

Features----------------------------------------------------------------

  • Unique, vivid color schemes that shift daily

　　　Vibrant, distinctive palettes mirror the story's emotional shifts

  • An emotional story with multiple endings, including merry bad endings

　　　While depicting many bitter conclusions, the narrative leaves a refreshing aftertaste upon completion

  • A unique gameplay experience where you interfere with emotions

　　　Use a pipette to “absorb words,” then rewrite memories and emotions to branch characters' destinies

  • Over 10 uniquely vibrant characters

　　　Beautifully rendered in pixel art, people whose emotions constantly shift

  • Pixel art × 3DCG creates a somewhat surreal world depiction

　　　Captures an atmosphere like a liminal space, existing between reality and unreality
